body.summary: The user called BrightSmile Dental reporting tooth pain in a previously root-canaled tooth and wanted to get it checked. The agent scheduled an exam appointment for Monday, June 22nd at 9 AM and confirmed the user's name and phone number. The user was informed that the dentist would assess the tooth and recommend further treatment if needed.
body.transcript:
bot:Thanks for calling BrightSmile Dental, this is Jessica. How can I help you today — are you looking to book an appointment, or do you have a question about our services?
human:I have some tooth pain. That is in the same teeth which I got it the root canal some time ago in the same clinic. I wanted to get it checked again. 
bot:I'm sorry to hear you're dealing with tooth pain, especially in a tooth that's already had a root canal. Let's get you scheduled for an exam so the dentist can take a closer look. When would you prefer to come in? We’re open Monday to Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM and Saturday from 9 AM to 1 PM.
human:I want to come in as early as possible. Can you give me what's the soonest slot that I can look for? 
bot:The soonest available slot would be Monday, June 22nd, at 9 AM. Would that work for you?
human:Yeah. Sure. 
human:That will work for me. Please book a root canal treatment for me. 
bot:Got it. I'll book you for an exam to assess the tooth first, and if further treatment like a root canal is needed, the dentist will guide you from there. Can I have your full name to confirm the appointment?
human:Yeah. My name is, uh, Rahul. Rahul Prasad. 
bot:Thanks, Rahul. I’ve got you down for an exam on Monday, June 22nd, at 9 AM. Could you share the best phone number or email address for the appointment confirmation?
human:Yeah. I will share my phone number. That's nine eight seven two one five seven two eight. 
bot:Thanks, Rahul. Just to confirm, your phone number is nine eight seven two one five seven two eight, correct?
human:No. It's seven nine eight seven two one five seven two eight. 
bot:Got it, thanks for clarifying. So your phone number is seven nine eight seven two one five seven two eight, correct?
human:Yeah. That's correct. 
bot:Perfect, Rahul. You're all set for an exam on Monday, June 22nd, at 9 AM. You'll receive a confirmation via text shortly. If you need anything else, feel free to reach out. Take care, and I hope you feel better soon!
human:Thank you. 
bot:You're welcome, Rahul! Take care, and we'll see you on Monday. Bye for now!

extractedData.name: Rahul
extractedData.Chief Complaint: Tooth pain in a tooth that had a root canal
